  cve2023.summary = CASE WHEN cve2023.summary IS NULL OR cve2023.summary = '' THEN "Critical Mastodon bug dubbed 'TootRoot' allowing attackers to send toots that create web shells on target instances; could completely compromise servers, access sensitive information, communications, and plant backdoors." ELSE cve2023.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  inc2023.date = date('2023-07-01'),
  inc2023.type = 'intrusion',
  inc2023.summary = "In July 2023, Mastodon fixed CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot'), which allowed attackers to send toots that would create web shells on target instances, enabling full server compromise and backdoor installation."

  inc2023.summary = CASE WHEN inc2023.summary IS NULL OR inc2023.summary = '' THEN "In July 2023, Mastodon fixed CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot'), which allowed attackers to send toots that would create web shells on target instances, enabling full server compromise and backdoor installation." ELSE inc2023.summary END
MERGE (inc2024:Incident {id:'mastodon-cve-2024-23832'})

  inc2024.type = 'account takeover',
  inc2024.summary = 'Mastodon fixed CVE-2024-23832, a critical flaw caused by insufficient origin validation allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over remote accounts.'

  inc2024.summary = CASE WHEN inc2024.summary IS NULL OR inc2024.summary = '' THEN 'Mastodon fixed CVE-2024-23832, a critical flaw caused by insufficient origin validation allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over remote accounts.' ELSE inc2024.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  rExploit2023.evidence = "Fixed in July 2023; tracked as CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot'); allowed creation of web shells on target instances and complete server compromise."
ON MATCH SET
  rExploit2023.evidence = CASE WHEN rExploit2023.evidence IS NULL OR rExploit2023.evidence = '' THEN "Fixed in July 2023; tracked as CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot'); allowed creation of web shells on target instances and complete server compromise." ELSE rExploit2023.evidence END
MERGE (inc2024)-[rExploit2024:exploited_in]->(cve2024)
ON CREATE SET
  rExploit2024.evidence = 'Tracked as CVE-2024-23832; insufficient origin validation allows impersonation and takeover of any remote account.'
ON MATCH SET
  rExploit2024.evidence = CASE WHEN rExploit2024.evidence IS NULL OR rExploit2024.evidence = '' THEN 'Tracked as CVE-2024-23832; insufficient origin validation allows impersonation and takeover of any remote account.' ELSE rExploit2024.evidence END
MERGE (inc2023)-[rTech2023:used_technique]->(techExploitPublicApp)
ON CREATE SET
  rTech2023.phase = 'Initial Access',
  rTech2023.details = "Exploitation of Mastodon vulnerability CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot') to achieve server compromise and create web shells.",
  rTech2023.evidence = "Attackers could leverage 'TootRoot' to send toots that would create web shells on target instances."
ON MATCH SET

  rTech2023.details = CASE WHEN rTech2023.details IS NULL OR rTech2023.details = '' THEN "Exploitation of Mastodon vulnerability CVE-2023-36460 ('TootRoot') to achieve server compromise and create web shells." ELSE rTech2023.details END,
  rTech2023.evidence = CASE WHEN rTech2023.evidence IS NULL OR rTech2023.evidence = '' THEN "Attackers could leverage 'TootRoot' to send toots that would create web shells on target instances." ELSE rTech2023.evidence END
MERGE (inc2024)-[rTech2024:used_technique]->(techExploitPublicApp)
ON CREATE SET
  rTech2024.phase = 'Initial Access',
  rTech2024.details = 'Exploitation of Mastodon vulnerability CVE-2024-23832 enabling impersonation and remote account takeover due to insufficient origin validation.',
  rTech2024.evidence = 'The flaw stems from insufficient origin validation, allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over their accounts.'
ON MATCH SET
  rTech2024.phase = CASE WHEN rTech2024.phase IS NULL OR rTech2024.phase = '' THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE rTech2024.phase END,
  rTech2024.details = CASE WHEN rTech2024.details IS NULL OR rTech2024.details = '' THEN 'Exploitation of Mastodon vulnerability CVE-2024-23832 enabling impersonation and remote account takeover due to insufficient origin validation.' ELSE rTech2024.details END,
  rTech2024.evidence = CASE WHEN rTech2024.evidence IS NULL OR rTech2024.evidence = '' THEN 'The flaw stems from insufficient origin validation, allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over their accounts.' ELSE rTech2024.evidence END

  rMal2023.evidence = CASE WHEN rMal2023.evidence IS NULL OR rMal2023.evidence = '' THEN 'Attackers could send toots that would create web shells on target instances.' ELSE rMal2023.evidence END;

MERGE (ta_Grayfly:ThreatActor {name:'Grayfly'})
ON CREATE SET ta_Grayfly.summary='Grayfly (aka GREF and Wicked Panda) is a targeted attack group active since at least March 2017, using custom malware and tools including Backdoor.Motnug (aka TOMMYGUN/CROSSWALK), Trojan.Chattak, and Cobalt Strike, and targeting sectors such as telecommunications, media, finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and IT service providers.'
ON MATCH SET ta_Grayfly.summary=CASE WHEN ta_Grayfly.summary IS NULL OR ta_Grayfly.summary='' THEN 'Grayfly (aka GREF and Wicked Panda) is a targeted attack group active since at least March 2017, using custom malware and tools including Backdoor.Motnug (aka TOMMYGUN/CROSSWALK), Trojan.Chattak, and Cobalt Strike, and targeting sectors such as telecommunications, media, finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and IT service providers.' ELSE ta_Grayfly.summary END
FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN ta_Grayfly.sponsor IS NULL THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET ta_Grayfly.sponsor = NULL)
FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN ta_Grayfly.motivation IS NULL THEN [1] ELSE [] END | SET ta_Grayfly.motivation = 'espionage')
WITH ta_Grayfly
MERGE (mot_esp:Motivation {type:'espionage'})
MERGE (ta_Grayfly)-[:motivated_by]->(mot_esp)
WITH ta_Grayfly

MERGE (ta_WickedPanda:ThreatActor {name:'Wicked Panda'})
MERGE (ta_Grayfly)-[:has_alias {date: date('2017-03-01')}]->(ta_GREF)
MERGE (ta_Grayfly)-[:has_alias {date: date('2017-03-01')}]->(ta_WickedPanda)
WITH ta_Grayfly
